info.name: RealtyDoor API v1.0
info.description: RealtyDoor platform API — Indian real estate lead-gen. Base URL: http://localhost:5000. Set authToken variable to your Clerk JWT.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Login sync and profile endpoints. Call POST /sync after every Clerk login from the frontend.

request.description: Call this on every login from Next.js. Verifies the Clerk JWT, fetches the full Clerk profile (name, email, phone, avatar), upserts the MongoDB record, and returns the full profile. Also stamps publicMetadata.role in Clerk if missing.
Self-service upgrade from USER to PARTNER. Only PARTNER can be self-assigned. Idempotent — if already PARTNER or ADMIN, returns current role.
Returns the full DB profile for the authenticated user including unread notification count and active subscription. Works for all roles (USER, PARTNER, ADMIN).
